# Summary

Describe the change in one or two sentences.

## Related issue

- Fixes #

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Security / redaction
- [ ] Release / CI

## Test evidence

- [ ] `npm run i18n:audit:strict`

## Security impact

Describe whether this change touches approvals, transport, debug bundles, release packaging, or public-facing metadata.

## Redaction checklist

- [ ] No secrets
- [ ] No private endpoints
- [ ] No private email addresses
- [ ] No personal data
- [ ] No sensitive screenshots or logs
